title: Cardosanctus officinalis
taxonomy: Cardosanctus officinalis is a plant species in the family Rosaceae. It belongs to the genus Cardosanctus. This plant is native to the southwestern parts of North America, particularly in the United States. Cardosanctus officinalis is often classified as a shrub due to its woody growth habit. Further classification of this species is ongoing, but it is currently considered to be a member of the asterid clade.
